mapper.insert: insert into posts (title, content, author_id, board_id,status,created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{boardId},#{status},#{createdAt})
mapper.select:
select p.*, u.username as author from posts p left join users as u on p.author_id = u.id
(p.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') OR p.content like concat('%',#{keyword},'%'))
p.status=#{status}
ORDER BY p.hot_score DESC
ORDER BY p.violation_score DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
select p.*, u.username as author from posts p left join users as u on p.author_id = u.id where p.id = #{postId}
